subject: [PATCH v3 20/20] Documentation: iomap: update docs to reflect iomap_iter_next model

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch updates the iomap documentation to reflect a change in how filesystems interact with the iomap API. Specifically, it removes the separate ->iomap_begin() and ->iomap_end() callbacks and instead uses a single iomap_iter_next() callback for every operation. This callback finishes the previous mapping (if any) and produces the next one. The patch also updates the documentation to reflect this change and provides information on how filesystems can implement the new callback using the iomap_iter_next helper.
